# NIP-38 Reference Card

NIP-38: User Statuses. kind:30315, required tags: none, optional tags: d (status type), r (URL), p (profile), e (note), a (addressable event). Filter pattern: kind:30315. JSON example: {"kind": 30315, "content": "status text", "tags": [["d", "status type"], ["r", "https://example.com"]]}.
